name: weaver-game
description: Weaver - Block puzzle game with BFS color clusters

scripts.build: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'www','www/src' | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'index.html' -Destination 'www/index.html' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'style.css' -Destination 'www/style.css' -Force; if (Test-Path 'src') { Copy-Item -Path 'src/*' -Destination 'www/src' -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path 'assets') { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'www/assets' | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'assets/*' -Destination 'www/assets' -Recurse -Force }"
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync

author: batuhan-smz
